description: AI拍摄指导相机 - 模特图生成提示词库
usage: 使用 Midjourney / DALL-E 3 / Stable Diffusion 按提示词生成标准模特图，每个姿势需生成两张：模特图(modelImage) + 纯轮廓线稿图(outlineImage)
generationNote: 所有提示词已去除真实人物特征，仅保留姿势结构、构图和风格方向。生成后需人工审核，确保符合版权要求。

prompts._base_instruction: 以下所有提示词生成时，请使用干净统一的画面风格，白色或浅灰背景（便于后续提取轮廓），标准青年/成年模特形象，不看镜头或自然看镜头，全身或半身构图，竖拍比例3:4。

甜美.name: 花丛甜美蹲姿
poseRules: 蹲姿或坐姿，手轻扶花朵
身体微微前倾，表情温柔
甜美.modelPrompt: A young female standard model, sweet style, squatting in a flower garden, one hand gently touching a flower, soft warm smile, natural lighting, clean background, 3:4 portrait composition, waist-level camera angle. The model should be anonymous with generic features, wearing a light pastel dress. Photorealistic but clean studio lighting style.
甜美.outlinePrompt: Pure white background, black clean outline silhouette of the same pose - a young woman squatting with hand reaching toward flowers. Simple line art style, only body contour visible, no facial details, no background elements. Perfect for overlay use.

甜美.name: 草地回眸一笑
poseRules: 身体侧向45度，脸转回看镜头
甜美.modelPrompt: A young female standard model, sweet style, standing in a grassy park, looking back over shoulder at camera, one hand touching hair, gentle smile, soft afternoon sunlight, clean natural background, 3:4 portrait full body composition, eye-level camera. Generic model features, light floral dress.
甜美.outlinePrompt: Pure white background, black clean outline silhouette - young woman standing, looking back over one shoulder, one hand raised to hair. Simple line art, body contour only, no face or background details.

甜美.name: 咖啡店窗边微笑
poseRules: 坐姿，身体微微侧向窗外
手拿咖啡杯或自然放桌面
温柔眼神看窗外或镜头
甜美.modelPrompt: A young female standard model, sweet style, sitting by a cafe window, holding a coffee cup, soft smile, natural window light from side, clean background, 3:4 portrait half body composition, eye-level angle. Generic features, casual light knitwear.
甜美.outlinePrompt: Pure white background, black line outline - young woman seated at a table, holding a cup, half body contour only. Simple clean line art for overlay.

甜美.name: 海边甜美站姿
甜美.modelPrompt: A young female standard model, sweet style, standing at seaside, one hand holding hat against wind, light dress flowing, soft smile, clean beach background with gentle waves, 3:4 portrait full body, waist-level angle. Generic model features.
甜美.outlinePrompt: Pure white background, black outline - young woman standing, one hand on hat, dress flowing slightly. Body contour line art only.

活泼.name: 街头跳跃抓拍
活泼.modelPrompt: A young female standard model, lively energetic style, mid-stride walking in urban street, arms swinging naturally, big genuine smile, bright daylight, clean city background, 3:4 portrait full body, waist-level camera. Generic features, casual sporty outfit, sneakers.
活泼.outlinePrompt: Pure white background, black outline - young woman mid-walk with arms swinging, dynamic pose. Simple body contour line art.

活泼.name: 旅行打卡挥手
活泼.modelPrompt: A young female standard model, lively travel style, standing in front of a scenic landmark, one hand waving high, happy expression, bright sunny day, clean composition, 3:4 portrait full body, slightly low angle to show height. Generic features, comfortable travel outfit.
活泼.outlinePrompt: Pure white background, black outline - young woman standing with one arm raised waving. Body contour line art only.

通勤.name: 职场干练站姿
poseRules: 一手拿公文包或自然垂下
通勤.modelPrompt: A young female standard model, professional commute style, standing confidently in modern city setting, one hand holding a tote bag, poised expression, clean office district background, 3:4 portrait full body, eye-level angle. Generic features, smart casual blazer and trousers.
通勤.outlinePrompt: Pure white background, black outline - young woman standing upright, holding a bag. Clean body contour line art.

通勤.name: 咖啡外带行走

通勤.outlinePrompt: Pure white background, black outline - young woman walking, holding a cup. Three-quarter body contour line art.

Both models have generic anonymous features, wearing casual light-colored summer clothes.

Generic anonymous child features, colorful casual clothes. Gender neutral appearance preferred.

generationChecklist: ✅ 每个pose生成2张图：模特实景图 + 纯轮廓线稿图
✅ 模特为匿名标准形象，不复制任何真实人物
✅ 画面风格统一（干净、明亮、专业）
✅ 背景简洁，便于轮廓提取
✅ 轮廓线稿为白色背景黑色线条，仅含人体轮廓
